package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for application_lifecycle_missing_shutdown_owner: Shared resources with visible startup paths but no obvious shutdown owner or lifecycle wrapper.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule003NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule003NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule003NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario003Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule003NegativeService, input Rule003NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
